positive: A whimsical, stylized forest scene illustration, viewed from a slightly elevated angle, showcasing a central grouping of large, friendly bioluminescent mushrooms and exotic, tropical flora. The color palette should be rich deep emerald greens, sapphire blues, and pops of neon turquoise and violet, contrasted against a matte, dusky background. The composition must emphasize strong silhouettes and graphic clarity, making it suitable for repeat apparel printing. Incorporate intricate patterns on the mushroom caps and leaves, drawing inspiration from Art Nouveau and mandalas, but maintaining a clean, modern vector feel. Perfect for a T-shirt print.
negative: blurry, watermark, logo, text, grain, noisy, signature, out of frame, poorly drawn, extra limbs, extra fingers, bad anatomy, low contrast, photorealistic
